name: Unjustly Accused
description: This model gains the following triggers on all actions printed on its stat card:

granted_triggers.name: Set Free
granted_triggers.applies_to: all actions printed on its stat card

granted_triggers.name: Bound and Tied
granted_triggers.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. Immediately, this action fails.
granted_triggers.applies_to: all actions printed on its stat card

extraction_notes: Bound and Tied has text indicating it must be declared if able, making it effectively mandatory
No explicit timing keywords present, defaulting to after_succeeding for both triggers
